description: Get the reputation of a file observable: file
name: ip

outputs.description: IP address that was tested EclecticIQ.IP.Created Date
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.IP.Address

outputs.description: EclecticIQ.IP.LastUpdate Date Observable last updated date
outputs.name: Observable creation date

outputs.description: Observable ID EclecticIQ.IP.Maliciousness Maliciousness confidence level
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.IP.ID

outputs.description: IP address that was tested IP.Malcious.Vendor For malicious IPs, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IPs, the reason that the vendor made the decision DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: IP.Malcious.Description

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
